title: Front Office Manager - Jungle Lodges Karnataka - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Jungle Lodges Karnataka - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Jungle Lodges Karnataka are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka!
